name: Spice Cookies with Candied Ginger
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) unsalted butter, at room temperature
3 tablespoons finely chopped crystallized ginger (about 1 large)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease heavy large cookie sheets.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat butter, sugar, and crystallized ginger until fluffy.
4. Beat in egg white, corn syrup, cinnamon, ground ginger, and cloves until combined.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix until moist clumps form.
6. Shape the dough into smooth balls about 1 inch in diameter.
7. Roll each ball in sugar and place on prepared cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. Using a glass dipped in sugar, press down on each cookie to create 2 1/2-inch rounds.
9. Bake for 13 minutes or until the cookies are light brown.
10. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring them to a rack to cool completely.
11. Sprinkle powdered sugar over half of each cooled cookie.
